# Convex DataTable — llms.txt

> A production-ready, fully typed React data-grid component with Airtable-style editing, selection, clipboard, state persistence, and optional Convex real-time adapters.

Package name: `@talentum/convex-datatable`
License: MIT
Framework: React 18+
Language: TypeScript (strict mode)
Internal engine: TanStack Table (not exposed in public API)

## Package Exports

- `@talentum/convex-datatable` — main entry point with all components, types, defaults, persistence utils, debug utils
- `@talentum/convex-datatable/styles.css` — bundled CSS stylesheet (must be imported)
- `@talentum/convex-datatable/convex` — Convex client adapter hooks (`useConvexDataSource`, `useConvexPresence`)
- `@talentum/convex-datatable/convex-server` — Convex server-side helpers (`presenceFields`, `heartbeatHandler`, `getPresenceHandler`, `clearStalePresenceHandler`)

## Installation

```bash
npm install @talentum/convex-datatable
```

Peer dependencies: `react` ^18.3.1, `react-dom` ^18.3.1, `convex` ^1.32.0 (optional, only for Convex adapter).

Import the CSS in your app entry:
```ts
import "@talentum/convex-datatable/styles.css";
```

## Components

### DataTable<TRow>

The main component. Renders a full-featured data grid with toolbar, headers, scrollable virtualized body, and optional draft row.

Required props:
- `tableId: string` — unique identifier for persistence keys
- `columns: ReadonlyArray<DataTableColumn<TRow>>` — column definitions
- `getRowId: (row: TRow) => string` — extract unique row ID
- `dataSource: DataTableDataSource<TRow>` — data fetching and mutation interface

Optional props:
- `features?: DataTableFeatureFlags` — toggles merged with defaults
- `rowActions?: ReadonlyArray<DataTableRowAction<TRow>>` — per-row context menu items
- `rowSchema?: RowSchema<TRow>` — validation schema for draft rows (Zod-compatible `safeParse` interface)
- `minRowHeight?: number` — minimum row height in px (default 40)
- `pageSize?: number` — rows per page (default 50)
- `theme?: Partial<DataTableThemeTokens>` — partial theme overrides
- `surface?: "default" | "plain"` — container visual style
- `className?: string` — additional CSS class
- `collaborators?: ReadonlyArray<CollaboratorPresence>` — other users' presence data
- `onActiveCellChange?: (cell: CollaboratorCellCoord | null) => void` — callback for presence
- `onError?: (message: string) => void` — error callback

### DataTableContainer

Optional gradient-background wrapper for visual polish. Place DataTable as a child.

## Column Kinds

All columns share: `id`, `field` (typed as keyof TRow), `header`, `kind`, and optional: `description`, `width`, `minWidth`, `maxWidth`, `isEditable`, `isResizable`, `isReorderable`, `isPinnable`, `isHideable`, `isSortable`, `isFilterable`, `accessor`, `validator`, `parseInput`, `serializeClipboard`, `parseClipboard`, `renderCell`, `renderEditor`.

### text
Single-line text. Extra: `placeholder?: string`.

### longText
Multi-line text with `pre-wrap`. Extra: `placeholder?: string`, `maxLines?: number`.

### number
Numeric input. Extra: `precision?: number`, `minimum?: number`, `maximum?: number`.

### currency
Currency formatted via Intl.NumberFormat. Extra: `currency: string` (required, ISO 4217), `locale?: string`, `minimumFractionDigits?: number`, `maximumFractionDigits?: number`.

### select
Single-value dropdown. Extra: `options: ReadonlyArray<SelectOption>` (required).
SelectOption: `{ value: string; label: string; colorClass: string; icon?: ComponentType }`.

### multiselect
Multi-value tag selector. Cell value is `ReadonlyArray<string>`. Extra: `options: ReadonlyArray<SelectOption>` (required).

### link
Clickable URL. Extra: `target?: "_self" | "_blank"`, `rel?: string`.

### date
Date formatted via Intl.DateTimeFormat. Accepts string (ISO) or Date. Extra: `locale?: string`, `timezone?: string`, `dateStyle?: "full" | "long" | "medium" | "short"`.

### reactNode
Fully custom column. All five callbacks required: `renderCell`, `renderEditor`, `parseInput`, `parseClipboard`, `serializeClipboard`.

## Data Source

```ts
type DataTableDataSource<TRow> = {
  useRows: (query: DataTableQueryState) => DataTableRowsResult<TRow>;
  createRow?: (draft: Partial<TRow>) => Promise<TRow>;
  updateRows?: (changes: ReadonlyArray<RowPatch<TRow>>) => Promise<void>;
  deleteRows?: (rowIds: ReadonlyArray<string>) => Promise<void>;
  restoreRows?: (rows: ReadonlyArray<TRow>) => Promise<void>;
};
```

DataTableQueryState: `{ sorting, filters, pageSize, cursor }`.
DataTableRowsResult: `{ rows, hasMore, isLoading, isLoadingMore, error, loadMore, refresh }`.
RowPatch: `{ rowId: string; patch: Partial<TRow> }`.

`useRows` is a React hook (called during render). Mutation functions are async.

## Feature Flags

All flags are optional booleans. Unspecified flags use these defaults:

| Flag | Default | Purpose |
|------|---------|---------|
| columnResize | true | Drag column borders to resize |
| rowResize | true | Drag row borders to resize height |
| columnReorder | true | Drag-and-drop column headers |
| columnPinning | true | Pin columns left/right |
| columnVisibility | true | Show/hide columns from toolbar |
| columnFilter | true | Per-column filtering |
| columnSort | true | Column sorting |
| rowDelete | false | Delete rows with undo toast |
| rowSelect | true | Row selection checkboxes |
| rowAdd | false | "Add row" button and draft row |
| rowActions | true | Row action overflow menu |
| editing | false | Cell editing (columns must also set isEditable) |
| cellSelect | true | Click-to-select cells and keyboard navigation |
| clipboardCopy | true | Ctrl+C copy selected cells |
| clipboardPaste | true | Ctrl+V paste into cells |
| undo | false | Ctrl+Z/Ctrl+Shift+Z undo/redo |
| infiniteScroll | true | Auto load more on scroll |
| virtualization | true | Only render visible rows |

## Row Actions

```ts
type DataTableRowAction<TRow> = {
  id: string;
  label: string;
  icon?: ComponentType<{ className?: string }>;
  variant?: "default" | "destructive";
  isVisible?: (row: TRow) => boolean;
  isDisabled?: (row: TRow) => boolean;
  onSelect: (ctx: { row: TRow; rowId: string }) => void | Promise<void>;
};
```

## Row Schema Validation

The `rowSchema` prop uses a structural interface compatible with Zod, Valibot, or any library with `safeParse`:

```ts
type RowSchema<TRow> = {
  safeParse: (value: TRow) => { success: true; data: TRow } | { success: false; error: { issues: ReadonlyArray<{ path: ReadonlyArray<PropertyKey>; message: string }> } };
};
```

## Theming

Pass `theme?: Partial<DataTableThemeTokens>` to override any subset. Tokens are injected as CSS variables on the table root.

| Token | CSS Variable | Default |
|-------|-------------|---------|
| fontFamily | --dt-font-family | 'IBM Plex Sans', 'Avenir Next', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif |
| radius | --dt-radius | 14px |
| borderColor | --dt-border-color | hsl(215 18% 85%) |
| headerBg | --dt-header-bg | linear-gradient(180deg, hsl(210 33% 98%), hsl(210 35% 95%)) |
| pinnedHeaderBg | --dt-pinned-header-bg | linear-gradient(180deg, hsl(210 28% 96%), hsl(210 28% 92.5%)) |
| rowBg | --dt-row-bg | hsl(0 0% 100%) |
| rowHoverBg | --dt-row-hover-bg | hsl(206 45% 97%) |
| pinnedRowBg | --dt-pinned-row-bg | hsl(210 20% 97%) |
| pinnedRowHoverBg | --dt-pinned-row-hover-bg | hsl(206 42% 95%) |
| pinnedShadow | --dt-pinned-shadow | 0 0 0 1px hsl(213 20% 84%), 0 8px 24px -16px hsl(215 30% 35%) |
| activeCellRing | --dt-active-cell-ring | hsl(206 90% 48%) |
| selectionBg | --dt-selection-bg | hsl(205 86% 94%) |

## Persistence

Table state (sorting, filters, column order, pinning, visibility, widths) is automatically persisted:

- **URL**: Parameters prefixed `dt_{tableId}_` (debounced at 150ms)
- **localStorage**: Key `rolha-grid:{pathname}:{tableId}:state:v1` (debounced at 250ms)
- URL values take priority over localStorage when both exist

Exported utilities: `encodePersistedStateToUrl`, `decodePersistedStateFromUrl`, `mergePersistedState`, `storageKey`.

## Convex Adapter

### Client — useConvexDataSource

Import from `@talentum/convex-datatable/convex`.

```ts
function useConvexDataSource<TRow>(config: ConvexDataSourceConfig<TRow>): DataTableDataSource<TRow>;
```

ConvexDataSourceConfig: `{ tableId, pageSize?, usePageQuery, createRow?, updateRows?, deleteRows?, restoreRows? }`.

`usePageQuery` receives `{ cursor, pageSize, state }` and returns `ConvexPageResult<TRow>: { rows, nextCursor, status, error }`.

### Client — useConvexPresence

Import from `@talentum/convex-datatable/convex`.

```ts
function useConvexPresence(config: ConvexPresenceConfig): {
  collaborators: ReadonlyArray<CollaboratorPresence>;
  onActiveCellChange: (cell: CollaboratorCellCoord | null) => void;
};
```

ConvexPresenceConfig: `{ tableId, userId, userName, userColor?, usePresenceData, sendHeartbeat, debounceMs?, heartbeatIntervalMs? }`.

Pass `collaborators` and `onActiveCellChange` to the DataTable component.

### Server Helpers

Import from `@talentum/convex-datatable/convex-server`.

- `presenceFields` — Convex validator for the presence document schema
- `heartbeatHandler(tableName)` — mutation handler to upsert presence entries
- `getPresenceHandler(tableName)` — query handler to get active presence entries (stale after 30s by default)
- `clearStalePresenceHandler(tableName)` — mutation handler to remove stale entries

Usage in Convex schema:
```ts
import { defineSchema, defineTable } from "convex/server";
import { presenceFields } from "@talentum/convex-datatable/convex-server";
export default defineSchema({ presence: defineTable(presenceFields) });
```

Usage in Convex functions:
```ts
import { mutation, query } from "./_generated/server";
import { heartbeatHandler, getPresenceHandler, clearStalePresenceHandler } from "@talentum/convex-datatable/convex-server";
export const heartbeat = mutation(heartbeatHandler("presence"));
export const getPresence = query(getPresenceHandler("presence"));
export const clearStale = mutation(clearStalePresenceHandler("presence"));
```

## Keyboard Shortcuts

| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| Arrow keys | Move active cell |
| Tab / Shift+Tab | Move to next/previous cell |
| Enter / F2 | Start editing |
| Escape | Cancel edit or deselect |
| Ctrl+C | Copy selection as TSV |
| Ctrl+V | Paste from clipboard |
| Ctrl+Z | Undo |
| Ctrl+Shift+Z | Redo |
| Shift+Click | Range select |

## Clipboard

Copy serializes selected cells as TSV text. Paste parses TSV and writes values starting at the active cell. The paste matrix is expanded to fill the selection if smaller. Each column kind has built-in serialization; override via `serializeClipboard` / `parseClipboard` on the column.

## Filter Operators

`eq`, `neq`, `contains`, `startsWith`, `endsWith`, `gt`, `gte`, `lt`, `lte`, `in`.

## Exported Types

CellCoord, CellRange, CollaboratorCellCoord, CollaboratorPresence, ColumnId, ConvexDataSourceConfig, ConvexPresenceConfig, ConvexPresenceEntry, DataTableCellEditorContext, DataTableCellRenderContext, DataTableColumn, DataTableColumnKind, DataTableDataSource, DataTableFeatureFlags, DataTableFilter, DataTableFilterValue, DataTableOnError, DataTableProps, DataTableQueryState, DataTableRowAction, DataTableRowActionContext, DataTableThemeTokens, DataTableRowModel, DataTableCellValue, DateColumn, FilterOperator, LinkColumn, LongTextColumn, MultiSelectColumn, NumberColumn, CurrencyColumn, ReactNodeColumn, RowSchema, RowSchemaIssue, RowSchemaResult, RowPatch, RowId, SelectColumn, SelectOption, SortDirection, StringKey, TextColumn.

## Exported Values

Components: DataTable, DataTableContainer.
Hooks: useConvexDataSource, useConvexPresence.
Constants: DEFAULT_FEATURE_FLAGS, DEFAULT_THEME_TOKENS, DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE.
Persistence: encodePersistedStateToUrl, decodePersistedStateFromUrl, mergePersistedState, storageKey.

## Quick Start Example

```tsx
import "@talentum/convex-datatable/styles.css";
import { DataTable, DataTableContainer, type DataTableColumn, type DataTableDataSource } from "@talentum/convex-datatable";

type Invoice = { id: string; customer: string; amount: number; status: string };

const columns: DataTableColumn<Invoice>[] = [
  { id: "customer", field: "customer", header: "Customer", kind: "text" },
  { id: "amount", field: "amount", header: "Amount", kind: "currency", currency: "USD" },
  { id: "status", field: "status", header: "Status", kind: "select", options: [
    { value: "draft", label: "Draft", colorClass: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-900" },
    { value: "paid", label: "Paid", colorClass: "bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-900" }
  ]}
];

const dataSource: DataTableDataSource<Invoice> = {
  useRows: () => ({
    rows: [{ id: "1", customer: "Acme", amount: 1250, status: "paid" }],
    hasMore: false, isLoading: false, isLoadingMore: false, error: null,
    loadMore: () => {}, refresh: () => {}
  })
};

function App() {
  return (
    <DataTableContainer>
      <DataTable tableId="invoices" columns={columns} getRowId={(r) => r.id} dataSource={dataSource} />
    </DataTableContainer>
  );
}
```

## Convex Full Example

```tsx
import "@talentum/convex-datatable/styles.css";
import { DataTable, DataTableContainer, type DataTableColumn } from "@talentum/convex-datatable";
import { useConvexDataSource, useConvexPresence } from "@talentum/convex-datatable/convex";
import { useQuery, useMutation } from "convex/react";
import { api } from "../convex/_generated/api";

type Deployment = { id: string; name: string; status: string; monthlySpend: number };

function useDeploymentPage(args: { cursor: string | null; pageSize: number; state: any }) {
  const result = useQuery(api.deployments.listPage, args);
  if (!result) return { rows: [], nextCursor: null, status: "loading" as const, error: null };
  return { ...result, status: "loaded" as const, error: null };
}

function DeploymentTable() {
  const dataSource = useConvexDataSource<Deployment>({
    tableId: "deployments",
    usePageQuery: useDeploymentPage,
    createRow: useMutation(api.deployments.create),
    updateRows: useMutation(api.deployments.update),
    deleteRows: useMutation(api.deployments.delete),
    restoreRows: useMutation(api.deployments.restore)
  });

  const presence = useConvexPresence({
    tableId: "deployments",
    userId: "user_123",
    userName: "Alice",
    usePresenceData: (tableId) => useQuery(api.presence.getPresence, { tableId }) ?? [],
    sendHeartbeat: useMutation(api.presence.heartbeat)
  });

  const columns: DataTableColumn<Deployment>[] = [
    { id: "name", field: "name", header: "Name", kind: "text", isEditable: true },
    { id: "status", field: "status", header: "Status", kind: "select", isEditable: true, options: [
      { value: "live", label: "Live", colorClass: "bg-green-100 text-green-800" },
      { value: "paused", label: "Paused", colorClass: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-800" }
    ]},
    { id: "monthlySpend", field: "monthlySpend", header: "Spend", kind: "currency", currency: "USD", isEditable: true }
  ];

  return (
    <DataTableContainer>
      <DataTable
        tableId="deployments"
        columns={columns}
        getRowId={(r) => r.id}
        dataSource={dataSource}
        features={{ editing: true, rowAdd: true, rowDelete: true, undo: true }}
        collaborators={presence.collaborators}
        onActiveCellChange={presence.onActiveCellChange}
      />
    </DataTableContainer>
  );
}
```
